name: Dogmatika Lawbringer
effectText: If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field and this card is in your hand: You can Special Summon this card. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can have each player send 1 monster from their Extra Deck to the GY. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Dogmatika" card in your GY, except "Dogmatika Lawbringer"; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Dogmatika Lawbringer" once per turn.
